title: rubus sceleratus
intro: Rubus sceleratus, also known as the bramble or wild bramble, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family. Traditionally, the plant's roots, leaves, and stems have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus sceleratus are attributed to its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and improve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications or ingested as a medicinal tonic.
